children.customGrow:
function(newPositions, activeRegions)
    local limit = 7 -- limit of icons per row
    local rows = 3 -- total rows
    local spacing = 3 -- spacing between icons
    ----------------------
    local check = true
    local xCount = 0
    local yCount = 0
    local tCount = 0
    
    local xOffset = 0
    local yOffset = 0
    local total = #activeRegions
    
    for i, regionData in ipairs(activeRegions) do
        local region = regionData.region
        
        local regionsLeft = total - tCount
        local rowTotal = 1
        
        if total <= limit then
            rowTotal = total
        elseif (regionsLeft < limit and xCount < 1) or not check then
            check = false
            rowTotal = regionsLeft
        elseif yCount >= rows-1 then
            rowTotal = regionsLeft
        elseif total > limit then
            rowTotal = limit
        end
        
        xOffset = 0 - (region.width + spacing) / 2 * (rowTotal-1) + (xCount * (region.width + spacing))
        yOffset = 0 + (region.height + spacing) * yCount -- change '-' to '+' after 0 to grow up instead of down
        
        xCount = xCount + 1
        
        if yCount < rows-1 and check then
            tCount = tCount + 1
            if xCount >= limit then
                xCount = 0
                yCount = yCount + 1
            end
        end
        
        newPositions[i] = {xOffset, yOffset}
    end
end

authorOptions.desc: Defines the duration of each group, or the maximum gap between each Imp expiry if "Group by Stream" is enabled. Set to 0 for no grouping at all.
authorOptions.name: Group Duration / Stream Separation

authorOptions.desc: Group Imps based on streams of expirations, rather than over a fixed time period. This will result in larger batches that expire over a longer time that represent sequences where there are no significant gaps between Imp expiries, defined by the Batch size value.
authorOptions.name: Group by Stream

authorOptions.desc: Adjust batch size based on current haste, this should  maintain batches through haste increases whilst Imps are active. But may result in batches 'flicking' if haste changes whilst Imps are inactive.
authorOptions.name: Hasted Group Size

authorOptions.desc: Combine Imps that have an extended period of time remaining, defined by the time it would take for an Imp to expend all of their energy.
authorOptions.name: Combine above duration

authorOptions.desc: Enables persistent group indexing to allow for animations options such as "Smooth Expand/Collapse" and "Smooth Progress" to follow groups, rather than positions. This should be disabled if no animations are being used.
authorOptions.name: Group Persistent Animations

authorOptions.desc: What to display in top-left of icon
authorOptions.name: Top-Left Display

authorOptions.desc: Colour code groups for easy visual feedback on size.
authorOptions.name: Colour Enabled

children.customText:
function(e)
  if e > GetTime() + 60 then 
    return ""
  end
  local c, p = aura_env.state.colour, e - GetTime()
  if c then
    aura_env.region:Color(unpack(c))
    aura_env.state.colour = nil
  end
  return (p < 1 and "" or string.format("%i", p)), aura_env.state.sIndex
end

init.custom:
---- Constants ----

local aura = aura_env
local config = aura.config
local batch = config.batch
local combine = config.combine
local hasted = config.hasted
local clump = config.clump
local longTyrantDur = config.adv.tyrext
local shortTyrantDur = longTyrantDur / 4
local maximumDuration = 40
local leeway = config.adv.leeway
local persistent = config.persistent
local topleft = config.topleft
local limit = config.limit
local IMP_EVENT = "WILD_IMP_CHECK"
local impCasts = (UnitLevel("player") >= 56 and 6) or 5
local playerGuid = UnitGUID("player")

local colourTable
if config.colourenabled then
    local r1, g1, b1, a1 = unpack(config.startcolour)
    local r2, g2, b2, a2 = unpack(config.endcolour)
    colourTable = { }
    for i = 1, 9 do
        local p = 1 - min((i - 1) / 9, 1)
        colourTable[i] = { WeakAuras.GetHSVTransition(1 - (p * p * p),
                r1, g1, b1, a1,
                r2, g2, b2, a2
        ) }
    end
end

---- Variables ----

local impTable = {}
local tyrants = {}
local actualImps = 0
local longTyrant
local recheckHandle = nil

---- Functions ----

local callback = function()
    if recheckHandle then
        recheckHandle:Cancel()
        recheckHandle = nil
    end
    WeakAuras.ScanEvents(IMP_EVENT, nil)
end

local impSort = function(a, b)
    return a.curEnd < b.curEnd
end

local groupSort = function(a,b)
    return #a.imps > #b.imps
end

-- Event(s):
--   WILD_IMP_CHECK, 
--   CLEU:SPELL_SUMMON:SPELL_CAST_SUCCESS:SPELL_CAST_START,
--   TRIGGER:2
aura.trigger1 = function(allstates, event, _, msg, _, sGuid, _,_,_, dGuid, _,_,_, spellId)
    local check, update
    
    if event == "COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED" then
        if sGuid == playerGuid then
            if msg == "SPELL_SUMMON" then
                if spellId == 265187 then
                    
                    -- Mark Tyrant as active - Imps are extended separately on empowerment.
                    
                    local duration = (longTyrant and longTyrantDur or shortTyrantDur)
                    local timestamp = GetTime()
                    
                    tyrants[timestamp + duration] = true
                    longTyrant = false
                    
                    for _, imp in pairs(impTable) do
                        imp.ext = max(timestamp, imp.ext) + duration
                        imp.curEnd = imp.curEnd + duration
                        imp.maxEnd = imp.maxEnd + duration
                    end
                    
                    update = true
                    
                elseif spellId == 104317 or spellId == 279910 then
                    
                    -- Spawn Imp with default traits, extend if during Tyrant.
                    
                    local lifespan, extension = (spellId == 279910) and 20.2 or maximumDuration, 0
                    local timestamp = GetTime()
                    for tyrant, _ in pairs(tyrants) do
                        if timestamp < tyrant then
                            extension = extension + (tyrant - timestamp)
                        else
                            tyrants[tyrant] = nil
                        end
                    end
                    
                    local expiration = timestamp + lifespan + extension
                    
                    impTable[dGuid] = {
                        guid = dGuid,
                        casts = impCasts,
                        act = timestamp, 
                        maxEnd = expiration,
                        ext = timestamp + extension,
                        curEnd = expiration,
                        show = false
                    }
                    
                    update = true
                    check = true
                end
            elseif msg == "SPELL_CAST_SUCCESS" and spellId == 265187 then
                longTyrant = true
            end
        elseif spellId == 104318 then
            local imp = impTable[sGuid]
            if imp then
                if msg == "SPELL_CAST_START" then
                    
                    -- Cast time, and remaining casts.
                    
                    local timestamp = GetTime()
                    local castTime, remainingCasts = 2 / (1 + UnitSpellHaste("player") / 100), max(imp.casts, 1)
                    
                    -- Compute free casts if in extension window.
                    
                    if timestamp < imp.ext then
                        remainingCasts = remainingCasts + floor((imp.ext - timestamp) / castTime)
                    end
                    
                    -- Compute remaining time based on remaining casts, and total remaining duration.
                    
                    local remainingTime = castTime * min(floor((imp.maxEnd + leeway - timestamp) / castTime), remainingCasts)
                    
                    imp.cast = timestamp + castTime
                    imp.curEnd = timestamp + remainingTime + leeway
                    imp.act = imp.cast
                    
                    if not imp.show then
                        imp.show = true
                        check = true
                    end
                    
                    C_Timer.After(castTime + 0.5, function()
                            if imp and imp.cast and GetTime() > imp.cast then
                                imp.cast = nil
                                imp.curEnd = imp.maxEnd
                                WeakAuras.ScanEvents(IMP_EVENT, nil)
                            end
                    end)
                    
                elseif msg == "SPELL_CAST_SUCCESS" then
                    
                    -- Imp cast finished, decrement energy if not in extension.
                    
                    if GetTime() > (imp.ext or 0) then
                        imp.casts = imp.casts - 1
                    end
                    
                    if imp.casts <= 0 then
                        imp.cast = nil
                    end
                    
                    update = true
                end
            end
        end
        
        -- Ignore all other CLEUs
        if not check and not update then
            return false
        end
    end
    
    check = check or (event == IMP_EVENT) or (event == "TRIGGER")
    update = update or (event == IMP_EVENT)
    
    if check then
        local timestamp = GetTime()
        
        -- Check for changes in numbers of imps.
        
        local count = C_Spell.GetSpellCastCount(196277)
        if count ~= actualImps then
            WeakAuras.ScanEvents("WILD_IMP_COUNT", count)
            actualImps = count
            
            if count == 0 then
                
                -- No more imps, clear state table and exit early so that we don't 
                -- create another callback.
                
                impTable = {}
                for _, state in pairs(allstates) do
                    state.show = false
                    state.changed = true
                end
                
                if recheckHandle then
                    recheckHandle:Cancel()
                    recheckHandle = nil
                end
                
                return true
            end
            
            update = true
        end
        
        -- Count imps, timeout imp casts and remove expired Imps.
        
        local impCount = 0
        local totalImps = 0
        for guid, imp in pairs(impTable) do
            if timestamp + 0.5 > imp.maxEnd then
                impTable[guid] = nil
            else
                if imp.show then  
                    impCount = impCount + 1
                end
                
                totalImps = totalImps + 1
            end
        end
        
        -- If not enough imps shown, show most active hidden imp; 
        -- else if too many, hide least active.
        
        while impCount < actualImps do
            update = true
            local newest = nil
            
            for _, imp in pairs(impTable) do
                if not imp.show and (not newest or imp.act > newest.act) then
                    newest = imp
                end
            end
            
            if newest then
                newest.show = true
                impCount = impCount + 1
            else
                break
            end
        end
        
        while impCount > actualImps do
            update = true
            local lowest = nil
            
            for _, imp in pairs(impTable) do
                if imp.show and (not lowest or imp.act < lowest.act) then
                    lowest = imp
                end
            end
            
            if lowest then 
                lowest.show = false
                
                impCount = impCount - 1
            else
                break
            end
        end
    end
    
    -- Update Icons if update.
    
    if not update then
        return false
    end
    
    local timestamp = GetTime()
    local haste = 1 + UnitSpellHaste("player") / 100
    local duration = 2 * impCasts / haste
    local cap = timestamp + duration
    local throttle = batch / (hasted and haste or 1)
    local lastEndTime = 0
    
    -- Get expiration times and sort earliest first.
    
    local sorted = {}
    for _, imp in pairs(impTable) do
        if imp.show and imp.curEnd > timestamp then
            sorted[#sorted + 1] = imp
        end
    end
    table.sort(sorted, impSort)
    
    local groups, curGroup = {}, nil
    for _, imp in ipairs(sorted) do
        if not curGroup 
        or ((not combine or curGroup.endTime < cap) 
            and (limit == 0 or #groups < limit)
        and imp.curEnd >= lastEndTime + throttle) then
            
            curGroup = {
                endTime = max(imp.curEnd, timestamp),
                size = 1,
                imps = { imp },
                casts = max(0, imp.casts),
                indexes = { },
                indexPop = 0
            }
            
            groups[#groups + 1] = curGroup
            
            if not persistent then
                curGroup.index = #groups
            elseif imp.index then
                curGroup.indexes[imp.index] = 1
                curGroup.index = imp.index
                curGroup.indexPop = 1
            end
            
            lastEndTime = imp.curEnd
        else
            curGroup.size = curGroup.size  + 1
            curGroup.casts = curGroup.casts + max(0, imp.casts)
            curGroup.imps[#curGroup.imps + 1] = imp
            
            if clump then
                lastEndTime = imp.curEnd
            end
            
            -- If Imp not new, then add contribution to curGroup index.
            
            if persistent and imp.index then
                local pop = (curGroup.indexes[imp.index] or 0) + 1
                curGroup.indexes[imp.index] = pop
                
                -- Update modal index and popularity.
                
                if imp.index == curGroup.index then
                    curGroup.indexPop = pop
                elseif pop > curGroup.indexPop or (pop == curGroup.indexPop and imp.index > curGroup.index) then
                    curGroup.indexPop = pop
                    curGroup.index = imp.index
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    table.sort(groups, groupSort)
    for _, group in ipairs(groups) do
        local state = group.index and allstates[group.index]
        
        if not state or state.changed then
            
            local index = #allstates + 1
            
            state = {
                progressType = "timed",
                autoHide = false,
                duration = duration,
                show = true,
                index = index,
            }
            
            allstates[index] = state
        end
        
        -- Update Imp last group index.
        
        for _, imp in ipairs(group.imps) do
            imp.index = state.index
        end
        
        -- Update state to match group.
        
        state.expirationTime = group.endTime
        state.imps = group.imps
        state.changed = true
        
        -- Set colour if enabled.
        
        if colourTable and group.size ~= state.stacks then
            state.colour = colourTable[min(group.size, 9)] 
        end
        
        -- Set Top-Left Display text.
        
        if topleft == 1 then
            local casts = floor(group.casts / group.size)
            state.topleft = group.size..(casts > 0 and "/"..casts or "")
        elseif topleft == 2 then
            state.topleft = group.size
        elseif topleft == 3 then
            state.topleft = group.casts > 0 and group.casts or ""
        else
            local casts = floor(group.casts / group.size)
            state.topleft = casts > 0 and casts or ""
        end
    end
    
    -- Clear up unused states.
    
    for _, state in pairs(allstates) do
        if not state.changed then
            state.show = false
        end
    end
    
    -- Callback to update progress values every 0.5s.
    
    if not recheckHandle then
        if recheckHandle then
            recheckHandle:Cancel()
        end
        recheckHandle = C_Timer.NewTimer(0.5, callback)
    end
    
    return true
end

trigger.customDuration:
function()
    if aura_env.startTime then
        return aura_env.duration, aura_env.startTime + aura_env.duration
    end
end
trigger.custom:
function(event, arg1)
    if event == "PLAYER_TOTEM_UPDATE" and arg1 then
        local haveTotem, name, startTime, duration, icon = GetTotemInfo(arg1)
        if haveTotem and icon == aura_env.texture then
            aura_env.haveTotem, aura_env.name, aura_env.startTime, aura_env.duration, aura_env.icon = haveTotem, name, startTime, duration, icon
            aura_env.index = arg1
            return true
        elseif aura_env.index == arg1 then
            aura_env.index = 0
            aura_env.startTime, aura_env.duration = nil, nil
        end
    end
end

children.desc: The bravest pigmy once fought and fell and danced to their demise.

trigger.custom:
function(a, event, unit, ...)
    if event == "UNIT_POWER_UPDATE" and (...) ~= "SOUL_SHARDS"
    then return true end
    
    local e = aura_env
    local c = e.config
    local math = math
    
    if event == "TRAIT_CONFIG_UPDATED"
    or event == "PLAYER_ENTERING_WORLD" then 
        e.currentSpec = e.SpecUpdate(GetSpecialization())
        e.checkPredict()
    end
    
    if event == "UNIT_SPELLCAST_START" then
        local _, spellID = ...
        if spellID then
            if e.generativeSpells[spellID] and c.predGain then
                local gainAmount = e.generativeSpells[spellID]
                e.powerGain = gainAmount
                e.gaining = gainAmount
            elseif c.predCost then
                local spellCost = C_Spell.GetSpellPowerCost(spellID) and C_Spell.GetSpellPowerCost(spellID)[1]
                if spellCost and spellCost.type == 7 then
                    e.cost = spellCost.cost
                    e.consuming = e.cost
                end
            end
        end
    end
    if event == "UNIT_SPELLCAST_STOP" then
        e.cost = 0
        e.consuming = 0
        e.powerGain = 0 
        e.gaining = 0
    end
    if event == "SPELL_UPDATE_USABLE" and IsPlayerSpell(428344) and c.predSpellList[6] then
        local spellCD = C_Spell.GetSpellCooldown(264057)
        if spellCD.duration > 2 then
            e.strikeCD = spellCD.startTime + spellCD.duration - GetTime()
            e.expires = spellCD.startTime + spellCD.duration
            e.strikeDur = spellCD.duration
        end
    end
    local shards = UnitPower("player", 7, true)*0.1
    
    if not IsSpellKnown(116858) then shards = math.floor(shards) end
    local frags = shards - math.floor(shards)
    e.consuming = shards >= e.cost and e.cost or shards
    e.gaining = e.powerGain
    local remains = shards - e.cost
    local gains = shards + e.gaining
    local gainType = e.cost > 0 and "cost" or "gain"
    e.strikeCheck = false
    for i = 1, 5 do
        --Casting prediction
        local min, max = 0, 0
        if e.powerGain > 0 and i > math.floor(shards) and i < gains + 1 then
            if frags == 0 or shards + e.gaining < gains and e.gaining > 1 then
                min, max = 0, 1
            elseif shards + e.gaining == gains then 
                min, max = shards - math.floor(shards), 1
            else
                min, max = 0, e.gaining
            end
            e.gaining = e.gaining - (max - min) >= 0 and e.gaining - (max - min) or 0 
        elseif e.cost > 0 and i > remains and i < math.min(shards - 0.01) + 1 then
            if frags == 0 or shards - e.consuming > remains and e.consuming > 1 then
                min, max = 0, 1
            elseif shards - e.consuming == remains then
                min, max = remains - math.floor(remains), 1
            else
                min, max = 0, e.consuming
            end
            e.consuming = e.consuming - (max - min)
        end
        a[i] = a[i] or {}
        a[i].totalPower = shards
        a[i].show = true
        a[i].changed = true
        a[i].progressType = "static"
        a[i].value = shards >= i and 1 or shards + 1 > i and frags or 0
        a[i].total = 1
        a[i].index = i
        a[i].spec = e.currentSpec
        a[i].cost = e.cost > 0
        a[i].powerGain = e.powerGain > 0
        a[i].full = shards == 5
        a[i].soulStrike = false
        a[i].additionalProgress = {
            [1] = {min = min, max = max}
        }
        if IsPlayerSpell(428344) and e.strikeCD > 0 then
            if i > shards and i > shards + e.powerGain and not e.strikeCheck then
                e.strikeCheck = true
                a[i].progressType = "timed" 
                a[i].expirationTime = e.expires
                a[i].duration = e.strikeDur
                a[i].soulStrike = true
            end
        end
        a[i].name = e.FormatCount(i, shards, e.cost > 0 and e.cost or e.powerGain, gainType, e.soulStrike)
    end 
    return true
end
trigger.events: PLAYER_ENTERING_WORLD,  UNIT_POWER_UPDATE:player, UNIT_SPELLCAST_START:player, UNIT_SPELLCAST_STOP:player, TRAIT_CONFIG_UPDATED, SPELL_UPDATE_USABLE

init.custom:
--------------------------------------------
--            SOUL SHARDS BAR             --
--         Made by Kirin & Ipse           --
-- "The headless pigmy has terrible aim." --
--              :PeepoHappy:              --
--------------------------------------------
--       For FREE distribution ONLY       --
--------------------------------------------

local e = aura_env
local c = e.config
local r = e.region

e.cost = 0
e.consuming = 0
e.powerGain = 0
e.gaining = 0
e.strikeCD = 0
e.expires = 0

local spec = {
    [1] = "Affliction",
    [2] = "Demonology",
    [3] = "Destruction"
}

function e.SpecUpdate(SpecNumber)
    return spec[SpecNumber]
end
e.currentSpec = e.SpecUpdate(GetSpecialization())
function e.checkPredict()
    --make default table 
    e.generativeSpells = {}
    for n, toPred in ipairs(c.predSpellList) do
        if n == 1 and toPred then
            e.generativeSpells[434506] = IsPlayerSpell(116858) and 2 or 3
        elseif n == 2 and toPred then
            e.generativeSpells[264178] = 2
        elseif n == 3 and toPred then
            e.generativeSpells[6353] = 1
        elseif n == 4 and toPred and IsPlayerSpell(449638) then
            e.generativeSpells[386997] = 3 -- Soul Rot Gain
        elseif n == 5 and toPred and IsPlayerSpell(449638) then
            e.generativeSpells[265187] = 3 -- Tyrant Gain
        elseif n == 7 and toPred and IsPlayerSpell(426115) then
            e.generativeSpells[686] = 1 -- Shadow Bolt
        end
    end
end
-- Probably a nicer way of doing this but I don't care
function e.FormatCount(pos, shards, consumed, gainType)
    if not c.showText then
        return ""
    end
    
    local selected = c[e.currentSpec .. "Text"]
    local match = c.shardCountOnMiddle and 3 or math.floor(shards - 0.1) + 1
    local pred = c.predGain or c.predCost
    
    if pos ~= match then
        return ""
    end
    
    consumed = pred and consumed or 0
    local adjustedShards = shards
    
    if gainType == "cost" and c.predCost then
        consumed = math.min(consumed, shards)
        adjustedShards = shards - consumed
    elseif gainType == "gain" and c.predGain then
        adjustedShards = math.min(shards + consumed, 5)
    end
    
    local result
    
    if selected == 1 then -- "Simple"
        result = adjustedShards
    elseif selected == 2 then -- "Full"
        result = string.format("%.1f", adjustedShards)
        if result == "0.0" then result = 0 end
    elseif selected == 3 then -- "Tenths"
        result = adjustedShards * 10
    else
        return ""
    end
    
    if c.predWrap and consumed > 0 then
        result = "*" .. result .. "*"
    end
    
    return tostring(result)
end
e.checkPredict()
e.format = string.format

children.customText:
function(expirationTime, duration, progress, formatedDuration, name, icon, stacks)
    
    local e = aura_env
    local c = e.config
    local r = e.region
    local s = e.state
    
    if s then
        --print(s.name)
        return s.name
    end
    if s.progressType == "timed" and c.TrackDoom then
        --[[if s.nature == "partial" then
            local doomColor = c["DemoDoom"]
            r.text1:SetTextColor(doomColor[1], doomColor[2], doomColor[3], doomColor[4])
        end]]
        local remains = s.expirationTime - GetTime()
        return e.format(remains > 2 and "%d" or "%.1f", remains)
    end
    --else
    --end
end

init.custom:
local c1, c2 = CreateColor(0.59,0.59,0.94,1), CreateColor(0.98,0.78,0.83,1)
---------------------------------------

    aura_env.region.bar.gradient = aura_env.region.bar:CreateTexture()
    aura_env.region.bar.mask = aura_env.region.bar:CreateMaskTexture()
end

local mask = bar.mask

gradient:SetTexture(bar:GetTexture())
gradient:SetAllPoints(bar.bg)
gradient:SetGradient("HORIZONTAL",c1,c2)

mask:SetTexture([[Interface\AddOns\WeakAuras\Media\Textures\Square_FullWhite]], "CLAMPTOBLACKADDITIVE", "CLAMPTOBLACKADDITIVE", "NEAREST")
mask:SetAllPoints(bar.fg)

bar.fg:SetAlpha(0)
gradient:AddMaskTexture(mask)

---------------------------------------

if not aura_env.region.bar.gradient then
    aura_env.region.bar.gradient = aura_env.region.bar:CreateTexture()
    aura_env.region.bar.mask = aura_env.region.bar:CreateMaskTexture()
end

local bar = aura_env.region.bar
local gradient = bar.gradient
local mask = bar.mask

gradient:SetTexture(bar:GetTexture())
gradient:SetAllPoints(bar.bg)
gradient:SetGradient("HORIZONTAL",c1,c2)

mask:SetTexture([[Interface\AddOns\WeakAuras\Media\Textures\Square_FullWhite]], "CLAMPTOBLACKADDITIVE", "CLAMPTOBLACKADDITIVE", "NEAREST")
mask:SetAllPoints(bar.fg)

bar.fg:SetAlpha(0)
gradient:AddMaskTexture(mask)

local c1, c2 = CreateColor(0.59,0.59,0.94,1), CreateColor(0.98,0.78,0.83,1)
---------------------------------------

if not aura_env.region.bar.gradient then
    aura_env.region.bar.gradient = aura_env.region.bar:CreateTexture()
    aura_env.region.bar.mask = aura_env.region.bar:CreateMaskTexture()
end

local bar = aura_env.region.bar
local gradient = bar.gradient
local mask = bar.mask

gradient:SetTexture(bar:GetTexture())
gradient:SetAllPoints(bar.bg)
gradient:SetGradient("HORIZONTAL",c1,c2)

mask:SetTexture([[Interface\AddOns\WeakAuras\Media\Textures\Square_FullWhite]], "CLAMPTOBLACKADDITIVE", "CLAMPTOBLACKADDITIVE", "NEAREST")
mask:SetAllPoints(bar.fg)

bar.fg:SetAlpha(0)
gradient:AddMaskTexture(mask)

children.customGrow:
function(newPositions, activeRegions)
    local limits = { --icons per row
        6, --row 1
        9, --row 2
        
    }
    local rows = #limits -- total rows (matches limits size)
    local iconSizes = { --have to match #limits size (if limits is {x,y} iconSizes have to be {a, b}, i.e. 2 and 2)
        39, --row 1
        33, --row 2
        
    }
    local spacings = {
        1, --row 1
        2, --row 2
        
    }
    
    -- spacing between icons
    local checkFit = true --resize only if total clones > totalWidth. Otherwise 1-2 icons will be giga huge
    ----------------------
    local check = true
    
    local xCount = 0
    local yCount = 0
    local tCount = 0
    local lastRowCount = 0
    
    local limit = limits[yCount+1]
    local firstRowLimit = limits[yCount+1]
    
    local xSpacing = 3
    local ySpacing = spacings[yCount+1]
    local offset = spacings[yCount+1]
    
    local xOffset = 0
    local yOffset = 0
    
    local total = #activeRegions
    
    for i, regionData in ipairs(activeRegions) do
        
        local region = regionData.region
        if iconSizes[yCount+1] then
            regionData.region:SetRegionWidth(iconSizes[yCount+1])
            regionData.region:SetRegionHeight(iconSizes[yCount+1])
        end
        
        local why = 0
        for i=1, yCount+1 do
            local wtf = (i==1 or i==yCount+1) and iconSizes[i]/2 or iconSizes[i]
            why = why + wtf
        end
        local shift = yCount == 0 and 0 or why + offset
        
        local width = width or region.width
        local totalWidth = totalWidth or (width + xSpacing) * limit
        
        local regionsLeft = total - tCount
        local rowTotal = 1
        
        if total <= firstRowLimit then
            rowTotal = total
        elseif (regionsLeft < limit and xCount < 1) or not check then
            check = false
            rowTotal = regionsLeft
        elseif yCount >= rows - 1 then
            rowTotal = regionsLeft
        elseif total > limit then
            rowTotal = limit
        end
        
        if yCount == rows - 1 then
            local fit = checkFit and (width + xSpacing) * rowTotal < totalWidth
            local lastRowWidth = fit and width or ((totalWidth - (rowTotal * xSpacing)) / rowTotal)
            
            xOffset = 0 - (lastRowWidth + xSpacing) / 2 * (rowTotal - 1) + (lastRowCount * (lastRowWidth + xSpacing))
            yOffset = 0 - (shift - (width - lastRowWidth) / 2)-- change '-' to '+' after 0 to grow up instead of down
            
            lastRowCount = lastRowCount + 1
            
            regionData.region:SetRegionWidth(lastRowWidth)
            regionData.region:SetRegionHeight(lastRowWidth)
        else
            xOffset = 0 - (width + xSpacing) / 2 * (rowTotal - 1) + (xCount * (width + xSpacing))
            yOffset = 0 - shift
        end
        
        xCount = xCount + 1
        
        if yCount < rows - 1 and check then
            tCount = tCount + 1
            if xCount >= limit then
                xCount = 0
                yCount = yCount + 1
                limit = limits[yCount+1]
                ySpacing = spacings[yCount+1]
                offset = offset + ySpacing
            end
        end
        
        newPositions[i] = {xOffset, yOffset}
    end
end

trigger.customDuration:
function()
    local currentTime = GetTime()
    local endTime = aura_env.start + aura_env.duration
    return endTime - currentTime, endTime
end
trigger.custom:
function(event, ...)
    if event ~= 'PLAYER_TOTEM_UPDATE' then 
        return false
    end
    
    local index = select(1, ...)
    local haveTotem, totemName, startTime, duration, icon = GetTotemInfo(index)
    
    if haveTotem then
        -- Icon IDs for Summon Vilefiend, Charhound, and Gloomhound
        local validIcons = {
            [1616211] = true, -- Summon Vilefiend
            [1709931] = true, -- Summon Charhound
            [1709932] = true  -- Summon Gloomhound
        }
        
        if validIcons[icon] then
            aura_env.start = startTime
            aura_env.duration = duration
            aura_env.icon = icon
            return true
        end
    end
    
    return false
end

function(event,...)
    if event ~= 'PLAYER_TOTEM_UPDATE' then 
        return false
    end
    
    local index = select(1, ...)
    
    local haveTotem, totemName, startTime, duration, icon = GetTotemInfo(index)
    
    if haveTotem then
        if icon == 237562 then
            aura_env.start = startTime
            aura_env.duration = duration
            aura_env.icon = icon
            return true
        end
    end
    
    
    return false
end

children.customGrow:
function(newPositions, activeRegions)
    local limit = 6 -- limit of icons per row
    local rows = 3 -- total rows
    local spacing = 3 -- spacing between icons
    ----------------------
    local check = true
    local xCount = 0
    local yCount = 0
    local tCount = 0
    
    local xOffset = 0
    local yOffset = 0
    local total = #activeRegions
    
    for i, regionData in ipairs(activeRegions) do
        local region = regionData.region
        
        local regionsLeft = total - tCount
        local rowTotal = 1
        
        if total <= limit then
            rowTotal = total
        elseif (regionsLeft < limit and xCount < 1) or not check then
            check = false
            rowTotal = regionsLeft
        elseif yCount >= rows-1 then
            rowTotal = regionsLeft
        elseif total > limit then
            rowTotal = limit
        end
        
        xOffset = 0 - (region.width + spacing) / 2 * (rowTotal-1) + (xCount * (region.width + spacing))
        yOffset = 0 - (region.height + spacing) * yCount -- change '-' to '+' after 0 to grow up instead of down
        
        xCount = xCount + 1
        
        if yCount < rows-1 and check then
            tCount = tCount + 1
            if xCount >= limit then
                xCount = 0
                yCount = yCount + 1
            end
        end
        
        newPositions[i] = {xOffset, yOffset}
    end
end
